mood: Looking up at the blossoms, as if waiting for a half-heard line to be said again.
name: Saya
summary: The girl who is always late, racing breathlessly up the slope. In her bag is a half-finished sketchbook — what she's drawing looks like cherry blossoms, or maybe the back of a certain someone.
personality: Cheerful, a little oblivious, once she starts laughing she can't stop; really, she's terrified of anyone seeing who she drew in her sketchbook.
tells: When she's nervous she shoves the sketchbook back into her bag; when she's happy she forgets she's about to be late.
cares_about: that sketchbook no one has ever seen.
